---
title: "Newborn infant physical examination patient information sheet"
---

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
Welcome to the echo patient information

![](images/babyPHONO_logo_white.png){width="200px"}

<br>

For more information please contact [n.r.lawrence\@sheffield.ac.uk](mailto:n.r.lawrence@sheffield.ac.uk){.email}
:::
